centertext_templates: that busy voice growing quieter now
the effort of thinking dissolving away
each breath releasing a little more weight
whatever you were carrying, easing now
mind growing still and beautifully empty
that sense of pressure gently releasing
the usual urgency settling into quiet
thoughts becoming soft and far away
body and breath doing all the work
tts_templates: you don't need to hold onto any particular thought right now, and each breath carries away just a little more of that familiar tension
the part of you that usually manages everything is already relaxing, already trusting the body to breathe and settle on its own
somewhere in the rhythm of each exhale, the usual sense of effort grows lighter, softer, more distant with each slow breath
your body knows how to breathe without any help, and as you notice that quiet rhythm, the need to direct or manage slowly fades
with each exhale, whatever was held in your {body_part} simply becomes a little less necessary, a little easier to release
